name: context-window
description: Portable SaaS skills library with QA, evals, and export tooling.

scripts.qa:skills: pnpm audit:skills && pnpm lint:md && pnpm export:flat-skills && pnpm export:cursor-rules && pnpm install:agent-runtimes -- dist/agent-runtime-smoke-test --global-all --codex-home dist/agent-runtime-smoke-test/.codex-home --claude-home dist/agent-runtime-smoke-test/.claude-home --cursor-home dist/agent-runtime-smoke-test/.cursor-home && pnpm verify:agent-runtimes -- dist/agent-runtime-smoke-test --global-all --codex-home dist/agent-runtime-smoke-test/.codex-home --claude-home dist/agent-runtime-smoke-test/.claude-home --cursor-home dist/agent-runtime-smoke-test/.cursor-home
